lineItemId.description: Unique identifier for this line item within the filing.

serialNumber.description: Serial number as shown in the regulatory form.

head.description: Short heading for the line item.

particulars.description: Detailed description of the line item.

amount.description: Amount in the filing currency and unit scale.

formReference.description: Reference to supporting form or schedule.

componentOf.description: lineItemId of the subtotal this item feeds into.

formula.description: Computation formula as sum of other lineItemIds.
